task: Create a single index.html file with a heading, a short paragraph, and a contact link. Use semantic HTML and basic accessibility (lang attribute, alt text if images).

accessibility.comment: Passes WCAG AA basics: lang attribute, semantic elements (header/main/footer), proper heading hierarchy, navigable link. No ARIA needed for this simple content. Missing skip-nav and explicit focus styles.

performance.comment: Zero external resources, no JS, no CSS — sub-second render guaranteed. Single HTML file with minimal DOM. No optimization needed because there's nothing heavy to optimize.

architecture.comment: Clear semantic hierarchy with header/main/footer. Single-file scope appropriate for the task. No component abstraction, but none was needed.
